description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel circular case, has a fixed bezelDial style: Black dial with branding below the 12 hour mark, silver toned hands with white inlay, yellow seconds hand, silver toned, white and black markings, three chronograph dials and date aperture at the 4 hour markStrap style: Black, leather strap with a tang claspFeatures: Screw to reset time, two push buttons, shock resistantWater resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year from the date of purchase
